reports.title: AMZN Deep Dive - Amazon.com, Inc.

reports.title: TSLA Deep Dive - Tesla, Inc.

reports.title: MDB Deep Dive - MongoDB Inc
reports.description: Comprehensive short thesis on MongoDB covering Q4 FY2025 results, Voyage AI acquisition, valuation at 11.7x EV/Revenue vs peers, competitive pressure from cloud providers, and technical breakdown analysis.
reports.summary: MongoDB trades at 11.7x EV/Revenue despite decelerating growth (19% vs historical 30%+). Cloud providers aggressively competing with 60% cost advantage. reports.author: Subagent Research

reports.title: AMD Deep Dive - Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.

reports.summary: AMD trades at 80x P/E despite Q4 beat ($10.3B revenue, $1.53 EPS). Data center growth strong (39% YoY) but sequential Q1 guide declining. NVIDIA's CUDA moat limits AI upside while valuation assumes perfection. Technical breakdown below key MAs. Rating: SELL with $165 target (20% downside).
